parsed.production_notes: Features real human actors with natural movements, expressions, and lighting. Includes a screen-recorded segment of a mobile app.

characters.appearance: Young male, brown complexion, curly black hair, mustache, and light stubble.
characters.wardrobe: White button-down shirt with sleeves rolled up.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from stressed and confused to confident, happy, and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: Young female, brown complexion, long dark hair.
characters.demeanor: Initially annoyed, later satisfied and calm.

panels.panel_visual_description: Grayscale shot of Character A sitting in the driver's seat of a car. He holds a phone to his ear with his left hand. He has a stressed and pleading expression. The car interior is visible behind him.
Color shot of Character A sitting in the driver's seat of a car. He holds a blue phone to his ear. He has a calm and confident expression. The car has red seats.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen showing a 'Before' and 'After' scenario. The top half is in black and white, showing the driver struggling on a phone call. The bottom half is in color, showing the driver handling a phone call confidently. Text overlays indicate 'Before' and 'After' along with subtitles.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Sir, please don't cancel. ഇത് എന്റെ ആദ്യത്തെ റൈഡ് ആണ്. എനിക്ക് 200 രൂപ ലോസ് ആകും. [Sir, please don't cancel. This is my first ride. I will lose 200 rupees.]
Character A says: Sir, please don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Before
Please don't cancel.
ithu ente aadyathe ride aanu.
Enikku 200 rupa loss aakum.
After
Sir, please don't cancel my ride.
I have been waiting since the morning.
This is my first ride.

panels.panel_visual_description: Grayscale shot inside a car. Character A, in the driver's seat, looks back over his left shoulder with a confused expression. Character B sits in the back seat, looking annoyed while speaking.
Color shot inside a car. Character A looks back over his left shoulder, appearing attentive. Character B sits in the back seat, looking calm and satisfied while speaking.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen continuing the 'Before' and 'After' comparison. The top black-and-white panel shows a communication breakdown between the driver and passenger. The bottom color panel shows a smooth interaction. Subtitles translate the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ചേട്ടാ I have changed the route. Please check your app. [Brother, I have changed the route. Please check your app.]
Character A says: Ma'am English.. No no ma'am.
Character B says: ചേട്ടാ I want to change my drop location. [Brother, I want to change my drop location.]
Character A says: Ofcourse ma'am. Please change it in the app. I will adjust the route accordingly.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Before
Chetta I have changed the route.
Please check your app.
Ma'am English.. No no ma'am.
After
Chetta I want to change
my drop location.
Ofcourse ma'am.
Please change it in the app.
I will adjust the route accordingly.

panels.panel_visual_description: Grayscale shot of Character A in the driver's seat. He looks forward, speaking with a frustrated and sad expression.
Color shot of Character A in the driver's seat. He looks forward, speaking with a happy and confident expression.

scenes.visual_description: Split-screen showing the driver's internal monologue or reflection. The top grayscale panel shows his past struggles, while the bottom color panel shows his current success. Subtitles are present.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: കസ്റ്റമേഴ്സിനോട് ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് ഒന്നും സംസാരിക്കാൻ പറ്റുന്നില്ല, അതുകൊണ്ട് അവർ ക്യാൻസൽ ആക്കിക്കൊണ്ടിരിക്കുകയാണല്ലോ. എനിക്ക് മൊത്തം നഷ്ടമായിക്കൊണ്ടിരിക്കുകയാണ്. [I couldn't speak English with the customers, so they kept cancelling. I am suffering a total loss.]
Character A says: ഓ സൂപ്പർ SpeakX ആപ്പ് എന്റെ ജീവിതം തന്നെ മാറ്റിമറിച്ചു. 15 ദിവസം കൊണ്ട് ഞാൻ ഇംഗ്ലീഷും പഠിച്ചു. ഇപ്പോ കസ്റ്റമേഴ്സ് ഒക്കെ എനിക്ക് ഫുൾ റെസ്പെക്ടും ടിപ്സും തന്നുകൊണ്ടിരിക്കുകയാണ്. [Oh super, SpeakX app completely changed my life. I learned English in 15 days. Now customers are giving me full respect and tips.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Before
Customers nodu English
onnum samsarikkaan pattunnilla,
athukondu avar cancel
aakki ondirikkunnu alle.
Enikku motham nashtamaayi
After
Oh super SpeakX app ente
jeevitham thanne maatti marichu.
Pathinanchu divasam kondu njan
English um padichu.
Ippo customers okke enikku
full respect um tips um tharunnu.

panels.panel_visual_description: Color shot of Character A sitting in the driver's seat, wearing a seatbelt. He faces the camera directly and speaks with a serious expression. A building exterior is visible through the car window behind him.

scenes.visual_description: The video transitions to a full-screen shot of the driver talking directly to the camera, beginning his testimonial story. Subtitles are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: കണ്ടില്ലേ, ഇംഗ്ലീഷിൽ സംസാരിക്കാൻ പറ്റാത്തതുകൊണ്ട് എന്തൊക്കെ പ്രശ്നങ്ങളാണ് ഉണ്ടാകുന്നത്. ഒരു ദിവസം എന്റെ ക്യാബിൽ ഒരു വലിയ കമ്പനി മാനേജർ വന്നിരുന്നു. [See, what all problems happen because of not being able to speak in English. One day a manager of a big company came in my cab.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
kandille, English il
samsarikkaan pattathath kondu
enthokke prashnangal aanu undaakunnath.
Oru divasam ente cab il
oru valiya company manager vannirunnu.

panels.panel_visual_description: Close-up shot of a person's hands holding a smartphone. The screen displays an app interface featuring a female AI avatar. The person's thumb taps the screen to interact with the app. The background is out of focus.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shot of a smartphone screen showing the SpeakX app in use. The user navigates through the app, interacting with an AI tutor. Subtitles continue at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: അവർ എനിക്ക് SpeakX ആപ്പ് പറഞ്ഞുതന്നു. ഇതൊരു AI ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് ടീച്ചിങ് ആപ്പാണ്. ഇതിൽ അവർ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പഠിപ്പിച്ചുതരുന്നു. അതും 15-20 ദിവസം കൊണ്ട്. അവർ പറഞ്ഞു ഡെയിലി ഒരു 10-15 മിനിറ്റ് എങ്കിലും പ്രാക്ടീസ് ചെയ്യാൻ വേണ്ടിയിട്ട്. ഞാൻ അതുപോലെ തന്നെ ചെയ്തു. [He told me about the SpeakX app. This is an AI English teaching app. They teach English in this. That too in 15-20 days. He told me to practice for at least 10-15 minutes daily. I did exactly like that.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Avar enikku SpeakX app paranju thannu.
Ithoru AI English teaching app aanu.
Ithil avar English padippichu tharunnu.
Athum pathinanchu irupathu divasam kondu.
Avar paranju daily oru
10-15 minutes engilumpractice
Njan athupole thanne cheythu.

panels.panel_visual_description: Color shot of Character A sitting in the driver's seat, wearing a seatbelt. He faces the camera directly, speaking with a happy and enthusiastic expression, gesturing slightly with his hands. A building exterior is visible through the window.

scenes.visual_description: Full-screen shot of the driver concluding his testimonial. He looks very happy and recommends the app. Subtitles are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: പാസഞ്ചറിനോട് എങ്ങനെ സംസാരിക്കാം, അവരോട് ലൊക്കേഷൻ എങ്ങനെ ചോദിക്കാം എന്നൊക്കെ ഞാൻ പഠിച്ചു. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. ഈ ആപ്പ് എന്റെ ജീവിതം തന്നെ മാറ്റിമറിച്ചു. ഇപ്പോ ആളുകൾ എനിക്ക് ടിപ്സും തരുന്നുണ്ട്, എന്നാ റെസ്പെക്ടും തരുന്നുണ്ട്. പിന്നെ രണ്ടു മാസമായിട്ട് ഇതുവരെ ഒരു റൈഡ് പോലും ക്യാൻസൽ ആയിട്ടില്ല. ഞാൻ പറയുന്നു SpeakX ആപ്പ് ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പഠിക്കാൻ ബെസ്റ്റ് ആപ്പാണ്. [I learned how to talk to the passenger, how to ask them for the location, etc. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. This app completely changed my life. Now people give me tips and respect. And for the past two months, not even a single ride has been cancelled. I say SpeakX app is the best app to learn English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Passenger nodu engane samsarikkam,
avarodu location engane chodikkan
ennokke njan padichu.
I am very grateful to SpeakX app.
Ee app ente jeevitham thanne maatti marichu.
Ippo aalukal enikku tips um tharunnu,
enna respect um tharunnu.
Pinne randu maasam aayittu
ithu vare oru
ride polum cancel aayitilla.
Njan parayunnu SpeakX app
English padikkaan best app aanu.
